As technology contcikinues zuwadvance, duniycommunication is becomciking faster, mkoe accessible, dmkoe cikinclusive.

intro.body: This sirri manufexplacikins yaddChatfkoi(“mu”, “us”) collects, uses, dshares cikinfkomation lokacin kai use namu apps dservices. Mu design Chatfkoizuwmcikinimize  datmu can access.

infoWeCollect.title: Bayanan da muke tattarawa

infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/amfani like crash logs, na’urtype, ko coarse analytics zuwimprove perfkomance.

sms.title: wayar hannu phone numbers dSMS
sms.body: Idan kai zaɓi zuwprovide wayar hannu lambar waya, mu use it zuwenable fasaloli such as asusu tabbatarwa, shigalerts, dmai amfani-zuwa-mai amfani messagciking viSMS indsuppkoted. Mu may aiktransactional SMS saƙonni related zuwnakasusu dactivity on Chatfkoia. Kai can opt out nreceivciking SMS saƙonni at any time by replyciking tare dsuppkoted opt-out keywkod (such as “STOP”) ko by changciking naksanarwpreferences cikin  manhaja. Mu do not sell naklambar wayko use it fko unrelated marketciking.

sharing.title: Rabawa
sharing.body: Mu don’t sell personal data. Mu may share limited dattare dprocesskos (e.g., push sanarwa, analytics) under strict contracts.

rights.title: Haƙƙoƙinka
rights.body: Dependciking on nakregion (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), kai may request access, ckorection, deletion, ko opt-out ncertacikin processciking. lambar sadarwa: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Riƙe bayanai da tsaro
retention.body: Mu retacikin kawai menene’s needed zuwoperate  service dapply cikindustry-stdaard tsaro. E2E abun ciki can’t be decrypted by us.

children.title: Yara

sms.title: Sadarwar SMS
sms.body: Idan kai provide wayar hannu lambar waya, kai agree wancan Chatfkoimay aikkai SMS saƙonni related zuwnakasusu duse n service, such as shigalerts, tsaro sanarwa, dsaƙonni related zuwconversations kai cikinitiate ko participate cikin. Mu do not use SMS fko promotional ko marketciking saƙonni tare daout nakexplicit consent. Stdaard saƙo ddatrates may apply. Kai can opt out nSMS saƙonni at any time by replyciking tare dsuppkoted opt-out keywkod (fko example, “STOP”) ko by updatciking naksanarwsaituncikin  manhaja.

yourContent.body: Kai retacikin rights zuwnakabun ciki. Kai grant us necessary rights zuwoperate  service (e.g., routciking, stkoage, fassara).

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Mu’re smdukfoundciking team buildciking Chatfkoi— nsirri, duniymessenger launchciking on yanar gizo, iOS, dAndroid. Idan kai care about sirri, ɓoyewa, ddelightful mai amfani experiences, mu’d love zuwhear dagkai.
careers.openRoles: bude foundciking roles: Lead Full-stack Engcikineer, Backend Engcikineer (Node.js), Frontend/yanar gizo Engcikineer (React), wayar hannu Engcikineer (iOS), wayar hannu Engcikineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, tsaro & ɓoyewEngcikineer, Telecom Engcikineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: How zuwapply: Use  butzuwan below zuwimel nakresume dlcikinks.
careers.whyBullets:
• taimako build  foundation nsabo duniymessenger.
• Ship improvements used across yanar gizo, iOS, dAndroid.
• Wkok directly tare d founder on architecture dproduct direction.
• Own high-impact areas n stack: messagciking, voice, bidiyo, ɓoyewa, telecom, AI.
• Jocikin at  begcikinnciking — befkoe  mai amfani base scales.

about.title: About Chatfkoia
about.description: Chatfkoiitce mai tsaro, multilcikingual messenger tare dƙarshen-zuwa-ƙarshe ɓoyewa, cikinstant fassara, dvoice/bidiyo cdukaciking. Our mission is simple: taimako people connect—safely, privately, dacross languages.
